query:
SELECT s.id, s.externalId, s.serviceName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId,
       c.name AS customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('SG3D608','SSHKYHN','SSCLR2F4','S1220','S1301','IPTEL-AB0','S0467','S1315',
                       'S0256','SSY3IJW','SSZ2TRXE','SS5ZNGFT','S0944','SSS03Z6Q','SB3PFMC','SAP1G3A','STBVXCV')
ORDER BY s.externalId;
